notes: The maze template is severely truncated (only 26 rows instead of 31, missing the bottom portion) and malformed with spaces/gaps causing broken wall rendering and ghost pathfinding failures; ghosts barely navigate correctly, pac-man collision detection is tile-based rather than pixel-precise, and the overall game is barely playable due to the broken maze layout.

Playable but clearly incomplete versus real Pac-Man, with a malformed/short maze, simplified ghost logic and collisions, awkward pause/escape behavior, and only approximate visuals despite no obvious fatal JS errors.
